mechanism_narrative: A sustained month-over-month decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate for equity valuations, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns during rate cuts are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above 4.0%, labor market slack triggers recession fears that immediately suppress equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the signal, or out-of-sample accuracy drops below 55%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real sales of automobiles and housing starts signals broad-based consumer demand strength, which compounds to generate positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint signal yields no incremental predictive power over single-series baselines, or 60-day forward returns are negative in > 50% of co-expansion periods.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp month-over-month contraction in the index of industrial production during a late-cycle expansion phase indicates supply-side bottlenecks and impending economic slowdown, forecasting negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Signal loses predictive power outside late-cycle regimes, or 20-day forward returns during industrial contractions are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Consistent month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects robust economic activity and corporate earnings momentum, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or payroll growth periods show no statistically significant positive equity returns.

mechanism_narrative: When the core consumer price index crosses above 260.0, inflation expectations trigger fears of aggressive central bank tightening, causing immediate negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 60% of triggered instances, or threshold crossing shows no significant negative return differential.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising inflation and stagnant federal funds rates creates a negative real interest rate environment that eventually triggers policy correction, forecasting negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction term yields negative or insignificant Rank IC, or 60-day forward returns during divergence periods are not significantly negative.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating real GDP growth during a post-shock recovery phase boosts corporate profit expectations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Signal fails to predict positive returns outside recovery regimes, or 20-day forward returns during GDP accelerations are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05).
